message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker with completed feature work

Sync beads issue tracker to reflect completed work on the detail modal
and analytics enhancement feature set (bead 3nwtd):

Newly closed (10 issues):
- A.1: Hardened Enter-to-detail-modal flow
- A.2: Full GFM rendering with syntax highlighting
- A.3: Collapsible tool call sections
- A.4: Session metadata header with analytics
- A.5: Enhanced keyboard navigation ({/}/[/]/g/G)
- B.1: ftui chart capability audit
- B.2: Interactive chart drill-down
- B.3: Hourly-granularity Explorer timeline
- C.1: Per-session analytics tab
- C.2: Analytics chart-to-search drill-down wiring

Moved to in_progress (2 issues):
- 3nwtd.1.6: Detail modal regression test suite
- 3nwtd.2.5: Real-time session stats bar
